name: Market Weather
description: A turnout forecaster for outdoor commerce — farmers markets, festivals, food trucks, street vendors, walkable storefronts. Set a location and Market Weather pulls 72 hours of weather from Open-Meteo (keyless), compares it against the last 30 days' local norms, and folds in temperature comfort, rain, UV, daylight, wind, weekend bonus, and time-of-day into a single composite turnout curve. The graph overlays each contributing factor as a faint band (daytime in pale yellow, rain in blue rising from the bottom, extreme heat/cold in red, weekend bonus in green) so you can see at a glance WHY the bold turnout line moves the way it does — and plan how much to stock, bake, or brew for the days ahead.
